title: The Kiss Thief
author: L.J. Shen
synopsis: A mafia romance with a powerful female lead who refuses to be owned, filled with passion and a surprising happy ending.

title: The Ruthless King
author: Maya Hughes
synopsis: Dark mafia romance with a fierce heroine and a ruthless hero, enemies-to-lovers with an emotional happy ending.

title: Chasing The Fierce Heiress
author: Unknown
synopsis: A fiery first encounter sparks an unforgettable clash when Hazel's bold spirit captivates Joshua, a ruthless billionaire with a penchant for control. To ensnare her, Joshua orchestrates a daring surrogacy competition, forcing her into his world.

title: It Ends With Us
author: Colleen Hoover
synopsis: Lily hasn’t always had it easy, but that’s never stopped her from working hard for the life she wants. When she feels a spark with a gorgeous neurosurgeon named Ryle Kincaid, everything in Lily’s life suddenly seems almost too good to be true.

title: It Starts With Us
author: Colleen Hoover
synopsis: Lily and her ex-husband, Ryle, have just settled into a civil co-parenting rhythm when she suddenly runs into her first love, Atlas, again. After nearly two years separated, she is elated that for once, time is on their side.

title: A Million Kisses In Your Lifetime
author: Monica Murphy
synopsis: Wren Beaumont is a model student loved by everyone but brooding campus bad boy Crew Lancaster. When their lives unexpectedly collide, Wren discovers there's more to life than good grades.

title: Fifty Shades of Grey
author: E.L. James
synopsis: When literature student Anastasia Steele interviews young entrepreneur Christian Grey, she encounters a man who is beautiful, brilliant, and intimidating. Unable to resist Ana’s quiet beauty, Grey admits he wants her, too—but on his own terms.

title: Fifty Shades Darker
author: E.L. James
synopsis: Daunted by the dark secrets of Christian Grey, Anastasia Steele breaks off their relationship. But desire still dominates her every thought, and when he proposes a new arrangement, she cannot resist.

title: Fifty Shades Freed
author: E.L. James
synopsis: Shocked and intrigued by Christian’s singular erotic tastes, Ana demands a deeper commitment. Determined to keep her, Christian agrees. Now, Ana and Christian have it all—love, passion, intimacy, and wealth.

title: The Love Hypothesis
author: Ali Hazelwood
synopsis: Olive Smith doesn't believe in lasting romantic relationships. To convince her best friend she is dating, she panics and kisses the first man she sees: Adam Carlsen, a young hotshot professor and well-known ass.

title: The Spanish Love Deception
author: Elena Armas
synopsis: Catalina Martín needs a date to her sister's wedding to sustain a lie about her American boyfriend. Her condescending colleague, Aaron Blackford, surprisingly offers to step in.

title: The American Roommate Experiment
author: Elena Armas
synopsis: Rosie Graham has writer's block and a crumbled ceiling. She ends up sharing her friend's apartment with Lucas, who proposes a series of experimental dates to jump-start her romantic inspiration.

title: Twisted Love
author: Ana Huang
synopsis: Alex Volkov is a devil with the face of an angel and a past he can't escape. When forced to look after his best friend's sister, Ava Chen, he starts to feel a fire that could end his world.

title: Twisted Games
author: Ana Huang
synopsis: Elite bodyguard Rhys Larsen has two rules: protect his clients and never get emotionally involved. He’s never been tempted to break them until Bridget von Ascheberg, a princess with a hidden fire.

title: Shatter Me
author: Tahereh Mafi
synopsis: Juliette hasn’t touched anyone in 264 days because her touch is fatal. The Reestablishment has locked her up, but now they think she might be exactly the weapon they need.

title: Unravel Me
author: Tahereh Mafi
synopsis: Juliette and Adam escape to join a group of rebels. She struggles with her deadly power and her confusing connection to Warner, who seems immune to her touch.

title: Ignite Me
author: Tahereh Mafi
synopsis: With Omega Point destroyed, Juliette must rely on Warner to master her powers and take down The Reestablishment once and for all. But Warner wants more than just a victory.

title: Restore Me
author: Tahereh Mafi
synopsis: Juliette is now the Supreme Commander of Sector 45. She has the whole world in her hand, but when tragedy hits, she must decide who she will become.

title: Defy Me
author: Tahereh Mafi
synopsis: Juliette’s tenure as leader is a disaster. Warner reveals secrets about her family and identity that change everything she thought she knew about herself.

title: Imagine Me
author: Tahereh Mafi
synopsis: Ella knows who Juliette is and what she was created for. As she struggles with her past, the lines between Ella and Juliette blur while old enemies loom.

title: Believe Me
author: Tahereh Mafi
synopsis: Life in the aftermath of The Reestablishment is hard. While stabilizing the world, Warner is eager to finally marry Juliette, the person he loves most.

title: Destroy Me
author: Tahereh Mafi
synopsis: Warner must suppress a rebellion while obsessed with finding Juliette. When his father arrives, he realizes there are much different plans for her future.

title: I Like You Like That
author: Kayla Tirrell
synopsis: Famous rock star Birdie Wilder is reunited with her teenage rejection, Liam Miller, who is hired as her bodyguard to protect her from a stalker.

title: Beautiful Player
author: Christina Lauren
synopsis: Hanna Bergstrom turns to her brother’s best friend, Will Sumner, to help her start dating. But a wild night teaches Will he can't forget her.

title: King Of Pride
author: Ana Huang
synopsis: Kai Young is controlled and proper until he meets Isabella, who is chaos personified. He is tempted to break all his rules to claim her as his own.

title: Final Offer
author: Lauren Asher
synopsis: Callahan Kane must spend a summer at the family lake house to claim his inheritance, putting him face-to-face with Alana, the only woman he ever loved.

title: Unfortunately Yours
author: Tessa Bailey
synopsis: Natalie Vos needs to be married to access her trust fund. She strikes a deal with August Cates for a marriage of convenience that turns into something dangerous.

title: Terms and Conditions
author: Lauren Asher
synopsis: Declan Kane must marry to become CEO. He enters a marriage of convenience with his assistant Iris, only to realize she was never just a transaction.

title: The Fine Print
author: Lauren Asher
synopsis: Rowan Kane encounters Zahra Gulian while renovating Dreamland. Despite the 'fine print' of their professional relationship, he finds himself falling for her.

title: King of Wrath
author: Ana Huang
synopsis: Dante Russo is blackmailed into an engagement with Vivian Lau. He’s determined to end it, but find himself obsessed with the woman he never intended to keep.

title: Twisted Hate
author: Ana Huang
synopsis: Josh Chen and Jules Ambrose enter a 'friends with benefits' arrangement with one rule: no falling in love. Their hatred soon turns into a fire neither can control.

title: Twisted Lies
author: Ana Huang
synopsis: Christian Harper steps in as Stella Alonso's fake boyfriend for protection. Stella soon realizes the man protecting her might be the most dangerous threat of all.

title: The Maddest Obsession
author: Danielle Lori
synopsis: Christian Allister, a cold FBI agent, is dangerously obsessed with Gianna, the wife of an enemy. Their connection threatens to unravel his carefully constructed world.

title: Corrupted Chaos
author: Shain Rose
synopsis: Asher Detrick thrives on danger. When he crosses paths with his rival’s sister, Briar, their reluctant partnership ignites a flame that threatens both their worlds.

title: Archer's Voice
author: Mia Sheridan
synopsis: Bree Prescott seeks peace in Maine and meets Archer Hale, an isolated man holding a secret agony. It is a story of memory, trauma, and finding freedom.

title: Black Ties and White Lies
author: Kat Singleton
synopsis: Margo lands a job as a fake fiancée for a billionaire. The white lies they tell the public start to feel real, revealing her boss's hidden heart of gold.

title: Bound by Honour
author: Cora Reilly
synopsis: Aria Scuderi is betrothed to Luca Vitiello to ensure peace between mafia families. She is terrified of marrying a man known as 'The Vice.'

title: Fix Her Up
author: Tessa Bailey
synopsis: Georgie Castle enlists her brother’s best friend, Travis Ford, for a fake relationship to gain respect. Their renovated love life soon feels permanent.

title: Owned by a Sinner
author: Michelle Heard
synopsis: Sold to Liam O’Shea to settle a debt, I’m thrust into the heart of the Irish mob. The man who 'owns' me might be the only one who can truly set me free.

title: Priest
author: Sierra Simone
synopsis: Father Tyler Bell has always followed the rules until Poppy confesses. She is his temptation, testing his vows and making him want to sin.

title: The Tease
author: Monica Murphy
synopsis: Jace uses his charm to get what he wants until he meets Maya, who is immune. It’s a game of cat and mouse for a love neither expected.

title: The Off-Limits Rule
author: Sarah Adams
synopsis: Cooper is my brother’s best friend and completely off-limits. But when we’re forced to live together, the lines between hate and desire blur.

title: The Sweetest Oblivion
author: Danielle Lori
synopsis: Elena Abelli is forced into an arrangement with Nicolas Russo. The oblivion he offers her is more sweet than she ever could have imagined.

title: Corrupted By You
author: Unknown
synopsis: Elara is trying to rebuild her life until she meets Silas, who is the definition of trouble. He is determined to draw Elara out of her shell.

title: Fracture Me
author: Tahereh Mafi
synopsis: Told from Adam’s perspective, he is torn between duty to the resistance and his need to protect his brother while struggling with his feelings for Juliette.

title: Shadow Me
author: Tahereh Mafi
synopsis: Kenji struggles to balance his friendship with Juliette and his duties as a leader, while dealing with the feeling of living in the shadows.

title: Reveal Me
author: Tahereh Mafi
synopsis: Picking up after Defy Me, Kenji must keep his friends together and figure out their next move as they face their greatest challenge yet.

title: Haunting Adeline
author: H.D. Carlton
synopsis: I can manipulate emotions, but my words don't affect the Shadow. He's always there, watching and waiting, and I can never look away.

title: Hunting Adeline
author: H.D. Carlton
synopsis: I’m trapped in a world full of monsters. The Hunter will burn the world down to get me back and carve his name into the souls of anyone who stops him.

title: King of Greed
author: Ana Huang
synopsis: Dominic Davenport’s obsession with success has pushed his wife Alessandra away. He’ll do anything to win her back, but she is done being second to his empire.

title: Unexpectedly Mine
author: Erin Hawkins
synopsis: I’ve been the 'boring' sister until a rugged stranger named Crew comes to town. We were supposed to be just a fling, but he’s become unexpectedly mine.

title: A Little Twist
author: Unknown
synopsis: Rafe and Lily have been best friends for years until a drunken wedding in Vegas creates a 'little twist' in their relationship.

title: Too Beautiful To Break
author: Tessa Layne
synopsis: Pax Tate is an arrogant asshole until he meets Mila Hill, the only person who sees through his act to the broken man underneath.

title: Den of Vipers
author: K.A. Knight
synopsis: My father gambles me away to settle a debt with the Vipers. In a den of monsters, I’m the one they should be afraid of.

title: Moments of Malevolence
author: Unknown
synopsis: I’ve lived in the shadows waiting for the right moment to strike. It’s a dark dance of obsession and revenge with the woman who challenges me.

title: Redeemed
author: Lauren Asher
synopsis: Santiago Alatorre is a racer searching for redemption. He and Maya find a connection in their shared pain and the strength to love again.

title: Collided
author: Lauren Asher
synopsis: Liam and Sophie have been rivals since they were kids. Forced to work together, their mutual hatred turns into an electric attraction.

title: Throttled
author: Lauren Asher
synopsis: Maya Alatorre wants to stay away from her brother’s rival, Noah Slade. But the chemistry pulling them together on the racing circuit is hard to ignore.

title: Wrecked
author: Lauren Asher
synopsis: Jax and Elena are two people wrecked by their pasts who find common ground in their brokenness in a small coastal town.

title: Now You're Mine
author: Unknown
synopsis: He’s been watching me and decided that I belong to him. Now that he’s claimed me, there’s no turning back. I’m his, and he’s mine.

title: Sinner
author: Sierra Simone
synopsis: Liam Brennan lives by his own rules. As a priest, he meets Tessa and finds himself questioning everything he’s ever believed in.

title: The Highest Bidder
author: Unknown
synopsis: Gabriella is sold to the highest bidder to save her family. Julian’s intentions are far more complex than she ever imagined.

title: Bound By Honor
author: Cora Reilly
synopsis: Aria Scuderi is eighteen and the day she dreaded is arriving: her marriage to Luca Vitiello, the future Capo of the New York Famiglia.

title: Ryan Rule
author: Sadie Kincaid
synopsis: Jessie meets the four Ryan brothers who share everything. She must decide if she’s willing to break all her rules to be with them.

title: Ryan Redemption
author: Sadie Kincaid
synopsis: The brothers and Jessie face new challenges and ghosts from the past. It’s a journey of redemption to protect their unconventional love.

title: Ryan Retribution
author: Sadie Kincaid
synopsis: In the final installment, the Ryan brothers and Jessie are out for blood and revenge after a devastating betrayal.

title: Ryan Reign
author: Sadie Kincaid
synopsis: The Ryan brothers and Jessie claim their throne, but reigning over the underworld is about survival. They must stand united or watch their empire crumble.

title: Ryan Renewed
author: Sadie Kincaid
synopsis: Jessie and the brothers must find a way to live in peace, but peace is fragile for men born of violence. They must decide their legacy.

title: Ryan Recollection
author: Sadie Kincaid
synopsis: A collection of memories and lost scenes offering a deeper look at the Ryan brothers and the woman who changed everything.

title: Cruel King
author: Rina Kent
synopsis: Levi King is the king of Royal Elite Academy. Astrid Clifford is the only one who doesn’t bow to his crown, uncovering a darkness that links their pasts.

title: Deviant King
author: Rina Kent
synopsis: Aiden King decides Elsa Steel belongs to him. He doesn't just want her body; he wants to break her spirit using her forgotten past.

title: Steel Princess
author: Rina Kent
synopsis: Elsa fights to regain her memories. She realizes that the 'king' she feared might be the only one who can protect her from true monsters.

title: Twisted Kingdom
author: Rina Kent
synopsis: Aiden and Elsa must decide if their twisted love is enough to see them through the wreckage of devastating truths about their past.

title: Black Knight
author: Rina Kent
synopsis: Xander Knight hides a secret that is killing him. Kimberly Reed has always loved him, and they must face the truth together or be claimed by darkness.

title: Vicious Prince
author: Rina Kent
synopsis: Ronan Astor and Teal van Dieren are forced into a marriage of convenience. Their friction turns into a fire that might be their most dangerous secret.

title: Ruthless Empire
author: Rina Kent
synopsis: Cole Nash sets out to break Silver Queensley, but realizes she might be the only person in the world who is just as ruthless as he is.

title: God of Malice
author: Rina Kent
synopsis: Killian Carson has no mercy. He decides Glyndon King is his plaything, but he might find she’s the only one who can handle his chaos.

title: God of Pain
author: Rina Kent
synopsis: Creighton King lives in a world of silence until he meets Annika Volkov. Her resilience challenges the walls around his heart.

title: God of Wrath
author: Rina Kent
synopsis: Jeremy Volkov is the 'God of Wrath.' His connection with Cecily Knight is explosive and forbidden, fueled by a wrath that threatens everyone.

title: God of Ruin
author: Rina Kent
synopsis: Landon King sets out to ruin Mia Sokolov's life for fun, but realizes she is a survivor who is ready to play his dangerous games.

title: God of Fury
author: Rina Kent
synopsis: Eli King is drawn to Nikolai Sokolov in a world where their families are enemies. Their love is the ultimate act of rebellion.

title: God of War
author: Rina Kent
synopsis: Brandon King lives for the fight. When he meets the one woman who refuses to back down, he must decide if he’s willing to surrender his heart.

title: Captured Solace
author: Unknown
synopsis: Hazel’s life takes a dark turn when she is kidnapped by Joshua, a man claiming to be her protector. As she navigates her new reality, she finds solace in his arms, but soon realizes his love comes with a heavy price.

title: A Long Time Coming
author: Meghan Quinn
synopsis: Breanna and Ty have been best friends since childhood, but a drunken night of passion changes everything. Now, they must navigate the complexities of their new relationship while dealing with the fallout of their pasts.

title: Flawless
author: Elsie Silver
synopsis: Rhett Eaton is a pro bull rider with a playboy reputation. Summer Hamilton is tasked with keeping him out of trouble. As they travel the circuit, they find a connection that is anything but flawless.

title: Heartless
author: Elsie Silver
synopsis: Willa is a single mother building a new life. When she meets Cade, a man with a heart of stone and a dark past, she’s determined to break through his defenses and heal his broken heart.

title: Powerless
author: Lauren Roberts
synopsis: In a kingdom that kills the powerless, Paedyn Gray hides her lack of 'gifts.' After saving Prince Kai, she is thrust into a brutal competition where she must outsmart her rivals and her own feelings.

title: The Predator
author: RuNyx
synopsis: Casper is a predator in a world of prey. When he meets Sloane, a woman who refuses to be intimidated by him, they enter a dangerous game of cat and mouse where the prize is a love that could destroy them.

title: The Reaper
author: RuNyx
synopsis: Tristan Caine is a reaper who leaves destruction in his wake. Morana Vitalio is the daughter of his enemy. When their worlds collide, they find a connection forged in blood and fire.

title: Vicious
author: L.J. Shen
synopsis: Vicious Baron is cold, ruthless, and determined to destroy the woman who broke his heart. Emilia LeBlanc has returned, and she’s ready to fight for her future in this dark story of obsession.

title: The Wrong Bride
author: Catharina Maura
synopsis: When a man marries the 'wrong' sister to settle a family debt, he expects misery. He soon realizes that his bride is far more than she seems, and may actually be the right one after all.

title: Ruthless Creatures
author: J.T. Geissinger
synopsis: Sloane is hardened by her past and has no room for the ruthless creatures of her world. When she meets a man as lethal as she is, they find a connection forged in blood and fire.

title: The Brutal Prince
author: Sophie Lark
synopsis: A 'brutal prince' is forced into a marriage of convenience with a woman who refuses to be intimidated. As they navigate their new life, they find a connection that is as dangerous as it is passionate.

title: Dr. Grant
author: Catharina Maura
synopsis: A dedicated doctor finds his life turned upside down when he falls for a woman completely different from anyone he’s known. It’s a struggle to balance professional duty and the heart.

title: Empire of Hate
author: Rina Kent
synopsis: A man built an empire on revenge. When he meets a woman who challenges his hatred, he realizes that the only thing more powerful than his need for vengeance is his love for her.

title: Pretty Rings and Broken Things
author: Kat Singleton
synopsis: A story of the 'pretty rings' that hide the 'broken things' in a marriage built on secrets. It’s a journey of self-discovery, resilience, and the power of the truth to heal.

title: Liars Like Us
author: J.T. Geissinger
synopsis: In a world of liars, two people find a connection based on the only truth they know—their passion for each other. It’s a story of deception, desire, and the struggle for truth.

title: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
author: Yuval Noah Harari
synopsis: An exploration of the history of our species, from the emergence of Homo sapiens in Africa to the present day, focusing on how biology and history have defined us.

title: Educated
author: Tara Westover
synopsis: A memoir about a woman who leaves her survivalist family in the mountains of Idaho to pursue an education, eventually earning a PhD from Cambridge University.

title: Thinking, Fast and Slow
author: Daniel Kahneman
synopsis: A world-renowned psychologist explains the two systems that drive the way we think—one fast and intuitive, the other slow and deliberate.

title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
synopsis: A practical guide to breaking bad habits and building good ones by making small, incremental changes that lead to remarkable results.

title: The Immortal Life of Henrietta Lacks
author: Rebecca Skloot
synopsis: The true story of a woman whose cancer cells were taken without her knowledge in 1951, becoming one of the most important tools in medicine.

title: Into Thin Air
author: Jon Krakauer
synopsis: A personal account of the 1996 Mount Everest disaster, detailing the grueling ascent and the tragic events that led to multiple deaths.

title: The Body Keeps the Score
author: Bessel van der Kolk
synopsis: A pioneering researcher explores how trauma reshapes both the body and the brain, and offers new paths to recovery.

title: Quiet: The Power of Introverts
author: Susan Cain
synopsis: An exploration of how modern Western culture misunderstands and undervalues the traits and capabilities of introverted people.

title: Becoming
author: Michelle Obama
synopsis: The former First Lady of the United States shares her journey from the South Side of Chicago to the White House.

title: The Devil in the White City
author: Erik Larson
synopsis: The true story of the 1893 World's Fair in Chicago and the cunning serial killer who used the fair to lure his victims.

title: When Breath Becomes Air
author: Paul Kalanithi
synopsis: A neurosurgeon’s moving memoir about facing a terminal lung cancer diagnosis and what makes life worth living.

title: Blink: The Power of Thinking Without Thinking
author: Malcolm Gladwell
synopsis: An investigation into the mental processes that allow us to make split-second decisions and why they are often more accurate than long deliberation.

title: The Glass Castle
author: Jeannette Walls
synopsis: A memoir of resilience and redemption, and a revelatory look into a family at once deeply dysfunctional and uniquely vibrant.

title: A Short History of Nearly Everything
author: Bill Bryson
synopsis: An accessible and humorous journey through the history of science, from the Big Bang to the rise of civilization.

title: Man's Search for Meaning
author: Viktor Frankl
synopsis: A psychiatrist’s memoir of surviving Nazi concentration camps and his development of logotherapy to find purpose in life.

title: Bad Blood
author: John Carreyrou
synopsis: The full inside story of the breathtaking rise and shocking collapse of Theranos, the multibillion-dollar biotech startup founded by Elizabeth Holmes.

title: The Power of Habit
author: Charles Duhigg
synopsis: Exploring the scientific discoveries that explain why habits exist and how they can be changed.

title: Born a Crime
author: Trevor Noah
synopsis: The story of a mischievous young boy who grows into a restless young man as he struggles to find himself in a world where he was never supposed to exist.

title: Hidden Figures
author: Margot Lee Shetterly
synopsis: The phenomenal true story of the African American female mathematicians at NASA whose calculations helped fuel some of America’s greatest achievements in space.

title: Why We Sleep
author: Matthew Walker
synopsis: A neuroscientist explains the vital importance of sleep and how it affects every aspect of our physical and mental health.

title: The Gene: An Intimate History
author: Siddhartha Mukherjee
synopsis: The story of the quest to decipher the master-code of instructions that makes us human and determines our heredity and health.

title: Killers of the Flower Moon
author: David Grann
synopsis: A true-life murder mystery about one of the most monstrous crimes in American history, involving the Osage Nation in Oklahoma.

title: Grit: The Power of Passion and Perseverance
author: Angela Duckworth
synopsis: A psychologist argues that the secret to outstanding achievement is not talent but a special blend of passion and persistence she calls 'grit.'

title: Kitchen Confidential
author: Anthony Bourdain
synopsis: An unfiltered look into the high-pressure, often chaotic world of professional kitchens, from a man who lived it.

title: The Art of War
author: Sun Tzu
synopsis: An ancient Chinese military treatise dating from the Late Spring and Autumn Period, attributed to the strategist Sun Tzu.

title: Outliers: The Story of Success
author: Malcolm Gladwell
synopsis: An examination of the factors that contribute to high levels of success, arguing that it is not just about individual merit.

title: Daring Greatly
author: Brené Brown
synopsis: A researcher-storyteller explores how vulnerability is not weakness, but rather our clearest path to courage, engagement, and meaningful connection.

title: The Tipping Point
author: Malcolm Gladwell
synopsis: Explaining how small ideas and trends can spread like viruses, reaching a point where they suddenly explode into massive changes.

title: Meditation for Fidgety Skeptics
author: Dan Harris
synopsis: A practical and humorous guide to meditation for people who think they can't do it or don't have the time.

title: The Year of Magical Thinking
author: Joan Didion
synopsis: A raw and powerful account of the year following the sudden death of the author’s husband and the illness of her daughter.

title: Wild: From Lost to Found on the Pacific Crest Trail
author: Cheryl Strayed
synopsis: A memoir of a young woman who, after the death of her mother and the end of her marriage, decides to hike the PCT alone.

title: Deep Work
author: Cal Newport
synopsis: An argument for the value of deep, focused work in a world full of distractions, and how to cultivate this skill.

title: The Psychopath Test
author: Jon Ronson
synopsis: A journey through the madness industry, exploring how we define insanity and the people who walk the line.

title: Zero to One
author: Peter Thiel
synopsis: A billionaire entrepreneur and investor shares his philosophy on how to build companies that create new things.

title: I'm Glad My Mom Died
author: Jennette McCurdy
synopsis: A raw and heartbreakingly funny memoir about the struggles of being a child star and dealing with a complicated mother-daughter relationship.

title: The Right Stuff
author: Tom Wolfe
synopsis: An account of the pilots engaged in U.S. postwar research with rocket-powered experimental aircraft and the first Project Mercury astronauts.

title: Just Mercy
author: Bryan Stevenson
synopsis: A powerful true story about the potential for mercy to redeem us, and a clarion call to fix our broken system of justice.

title: How to Win Friends and Influence People
author: Dale Carnegie
synopsis: One of the most famous self-help books of all time, offering time-tested advice on how to build better relationships and succeed in business.

title: The Omnivore's Dilemma
author: Michael Pollan
synopsis: An investigation into the modern food chain, following several different meals from their origin to the table.

title: Freakonomics
author: Steven D. Levitt
synopsis: Using economic theory to explore a wide range of diverse subjects, from the inner workings of a crack gang to why people cheat.

title: The Sixth Extinction
author: Elizabeth Kolbert
synopsis: An exploration of how human activities are causing the fastest and most widespread mass extinction in Earth's history.

title: Small Fry
author: Lisa Brennan-Jobs
synopsis: A coming-of-age memoir about a daughter’s complicated relationship with her father, the visionary Steve Jobs.

title: Unbroken
author: Laura Hillenbrand
synopsis: The incredible true story of Louis Zamperini, an Olympic runner who survived a plane crash in the Pacific and became a prisoner of war during WWII.

title: The Emperor of All Maladies
author: Siddhartha Mukherjee
synopsis: A comprehensive history of cancer, from its first documented appearances in antiquity to modern treatments and research.

title: Lab Girl
author: Hope Jahren
synopsis: A memoir by a geobiologist about her life in science, her love of plants, and her deep friendship with her lab partner.

title: The New Jim Crow
author: Michelle Alexander
synopsis: An examination of how the U.S. criminal justice system functions as a contemporary system of racial control.

title: Range: Why Generalists Triumph in a Specialized World
author: David Epstein
synopsis: An argument that the most successful people in many fields are those who start broad and dabble in many areas rather than specializing early.

title: Hidden Valley Road
author: Robert Kolker
synopsis: The heartrending story of a mid-century American family with twelve children, six of whom were diagnosed with schizophrenia.

title: The Subtle Art of Not Giving a F*ck
author: Mark Manson
synopsis: A counterintuitive approach to living a good life, arguing that we should focus on what truly matters and let go of the rest.

title: Breath: The New Science of a Lost Art
author: James Nestor
synopsis: An investigation into the history and science of breathing, and how changing the way we breathe can improve our health.

title: A Brief History of Time
author: Stephen Hawking
synopsis: One of the most iconic science books of all time, Hawking explains complex concepts like the Big Bang, black holes, and the nature of time in a way that is accessible to non-scientists.

title: Make It Stick: The Science of Successful Learning
author: Peter C. Brown
synopsis: Drawing on recent discoveries in cognitive psychology and other disciplines, this book offers concrete techniques for becoming a more effective learner.

title: The Wealth of Nations
author: Adam Smith
synopsis: The foundational work of modern economics. Smith explores the mechanics of free markets, the division of labor, and the 'invisible hand' that drives productivity.

title: Mindset: The New Psychology of Success
author: Carol S. Dweck
synopsis: Dweck explains why it’s not just our abilities and talent that bring us success, but whether we approach our goals with a fixed or growth mindset.

title: Guns, Germs, and Steel
author: Jared Diamond
synopsis: Diamond argues that the gaps in power and technology between human societies stem from environmental and geographical differences rather than biological ones.

title: The Republic
author: Plato
synopsis: A Socratic dialogue concerning justice, the order and character of the just city-state, and the just man. It is one of the world's most influential works of philosophy.

title: Basic Economics
author: Thomas Sowell
synopsis: A citizen's guide to the economy that explains economic principles without jargon or equations, using real-world examples from around the globe.

title: A Mind for Numbers
author: Barbara Oakley
synopsis: Oakley provides a guide on how to excel in math and science, even if you’ve struggled with them in the past, by understanding how the brain learns.

title: Lies My Teacher Told Me
author: James W. Loewen
synopsis: An examination of American history textbooks and the myths and misinformation they often promote, encouraging a more critical look at history.

title: Ultralearning
author: Scott H. Young
synopsis: Young shares strategies for mastering hard skills quickly, outsmarting the competition, and accelerating your career through self-directed learning.

title: Thinking Strategically
author: Avinash Dixit
synopsis: An introduction to game theory, showing how to use strategic thinking in business, politics, and everyday life to gain a competitive edge.

title: The Selfish Gene
author: Richard Dawkins
synopsis: Dawkins introduces the gene-centered view of evolution, explaining how the drive for genetic survival explains complex biological behaviors.

title: Rich Dad Poor Dad
author: Robert T. Kiyosaki
synopsis: A personal finance classic that contrasts different philosophies on money, teaching the importance of financial literacy and building assets.

title: The 7 Habits of Highly Effective People
author: Stephen R. Covey
synopsis: A step-by-step pathway for living with fairness, integrity, and human dignity—principles that give us the security to adapt to change.

title: Astrophysics for People in a Hurry
author: Neil deGrasse Tyson
synopsis: A thin, readable guide to the cosmos that covers the Big Bang, dark matter, and the search for life in the universe.

title: The Man Who Mistook His Wife for a Hat
author: Oliver Sacks
synopsis: Neurologist Oliver Sacks describes the case histories of patients lost in the bizarre world of neurological disorders.

title: Team of Rivals
author: Doris Kearns Goodwin
synopsis: A biographical study of Abraham Lincoln and his cabinet, exploring his political genius in uniting his former opponents for a common cause.

title: The Diary of a Young Girl
author: Anne Frank
synopsis: The personal diary of a young Jewish girl in hiding during the Nazi occupation of the Netherlands, providing an intimate look at the human spirit.

title: I Know Why the Caged Bird Sings
author: Maya Angelou
synopsis: An autobiography illustrating how strength of character and a love of literature can help overcome trauma and racism.

title: The Smartest Kids in the World
author: Amanda Ripley
synopsis: Ripley follows three American students living abroad to investigate why some countries have much higher educational outcomes than others.

title: Being Logical: A Guide to Good Thinking
author: D.Q. McInerny
synopsis: A clear and concise guide to the principles of logic, helping readers develop the skills of coherent reasoning and effective communication.

title: The Genius of China
author: Robert K.G. Temple
synopsis: An exploration of 3,000 years of Chinese science and invention, revealing how many modern technologies had ancient Chinese origins.

title: How to Read a Book
author: Mortimer J. Adler
synopsis: The classic guide to intelligent reading, explaining different levels of reading and how to truly engage with a text.

title: Why Don't Students Like School?
author: Daniel T. Willingham
synopsis: A cognitive scientist explains how the brain works in a classroom setting and what it means for teaching and learning.

title: The 48 Laws of Power
author: Robert Greene
synopsis: Amoral, cunning, ruthless, and instructive, this book distills three thousand years of the history of power into 48 laws.

title: A Little History of Economics
author: Niall Kishtainy
synopsis: A beginner-friendly guide that traces the history of economic thought from ancient times to the modern global economy.

title: The Courage to Be Disliked
author: Ichiro Kishimi
synopsis: Based on Adlerian psychology, this book uses a dialogue between a philosopher and a young man to teach how to free yourself from the past.

title: Make It Stick
author: Peter C. Brown
synopsis: Highly recommended for students, this book explores why traditional study methods like re-reading don't work and what science says actually does.

title: Einstein: His Life and Universe
author: Walter Isaacson
synopsis: A biography exploring how Einstein's mind worked and how his rebellious nature led to his groundbreaking scientific discoveries.

title: Economics: The User's Guide
author: Ha-Joon Chang
synopsis: Chang explains how the global economy works and why many economic theories are not as 'scientific' as they claim to be.

title: The Silent Patient
author: Alex Michaelides
synopsis: Alicia Berenson is a famous painter who shoots her husband five times in the face and then never speaks another word. A criminal psychotherapist becomes obsessed with uncovering her motive.

title: The Way of Kings
author: Brandon Sanderson
synopsis: On a world of stone and storms, four characters lead a struggle for power and survival as ancient secrets of the Knights Radiant begin to resurface.

title: Gone Girl
author: Gillian Flynn
synopsis: On the morning of their fifth wedding anniversary, Amy Dunne disappears. Under pressure from the police and a media frenzy, Nick’s portrait of a blissful marriage begins to crumble.

title: Circe
author: Madeline Miller
synopsis: The daughter of the sun god Helios is banished to a deserted island, where she hones her witchcraft and crosses paths with famous mythological figures like Hermes and Odysseus.

title: The Guest List
author: Lucy Foley
synopsis: A celebrity wedding on a remote island off the coast of Ireland turns deadly when a body is found. Everyone has a secret, and everyone has a motive.

title: The Name of the Wind
author: Patrick Rothfuss
synopsis: Kvothe, a legendary figure, tells the story of his childhood in a traveling troupe, his years as a near-feral orphan, and his struggle to enter a school of magic.

title: Verity
author: Colleen Hoover
synopsis: A struggling writer accepts the job of a lifetime: finishing the book series of an injured world-famous author. While there, she finds a chilling unfinished autobiography.

title: Mexican Gothic
author: Silvia Moreno-Garcia
synopsis: A glamorous socialite travels to a remote mansion in the mountains to save her cousin, only to discover a decaying family and a horrifying supernatural secret.

title: The House in the Cerulean Sea
author: TJ Klune
synopsis: A caseworker for magical youth is sent to an island orphanage to determine if six dangerous children could bring about the end of the world.

title: Dark Matter
author: Blake Crouch
synopsis: A physics professor is kidnapped and knocked unconscious, only to wake up in a world where his life is completely different. He must fight to find his way back to his true family.

title: None of This is True
author: Lisa Jewell
synopsis: A podcaster meets a woman on her birthday who claims they are 'birthday twins.' As they work on a podcast together, the woman’s life begins to invade the podcaster's in terrifying ways.

title: The 7 1/2 Deaths of Evelyn Hardcastle
author: Stuart Turton
synopsis: A man must solve a murder at a costume party, but every time the day ends, he wakes up in the body of a different guest.

title: Yellowface
author: R.F. Kuang
synopsis: When a successful Asian-American author dies, her 'friend' steals her manuscript and publishes it as her own, leading to a satirical spiral of lies and social media cancellation.

title: The Night Circus
author: Erin Morgenstern
synopsis: Two young magicians are pitted against each other in a magical competition within a traveling circus that only opens at night.

title: Normal People
author: Sally Rooney
synopsis: The story of the complex relationship between Marianne and Connell as they move from high school into their university years.

title: A Flicker in the Dark
author: Stacy Willingham
synopsis: The daughter of a serial killer thinks she’s finally moved on with her life, until local teenage girls begin to go missing in the exact same pattern as her father's crimes.

title: The Paris Apartment
author: Lucy Foley
synopsis: Jess goes to Paris to stay with her brother for a fresh start, only to find him missing and his neighbors suspicious and unfriendly.

title: The Last Thing He Told Me
author: Laura Dave
synopsis: Before vanishing, a man leaves a note for his wife: 'Protect her.' She must work with her stepdaughter to uncover why he disappeared.

title: Hidden Pictures
author: Jason Rekulak
synopsis: A nanny discovers that her five-year-old charge is drawing increasingly disturbing pictures that suggest a supernatural secret or a past murder.

title: Recursion
author: Blake Crouch
synopsis: A detective and a scientist team up to stop a phenomenon that allows people to rewrite their memories, threatening the stability of reality itself.

title: Daisy Jones & The Six
author: Taylor Jenkins Reid
synopsis: An oral history of the rise and fall of a famous 1970s rock band and the magnetic lead singer who changed everything.

title: Then She Was Gone
author: Lisa Jewell
synopsis: Ten years after her daughter disappeared, a woman meets a man whose young daughter looks uncannily like her missing child.

title: The Locked Door
author: Freida McFadden
synopsis: A surgeon’s father was a serial killer. Now, years later, her own patients are being murdered in the exact same way.

title: Home Before Dark
author: Riley Sager
synopsis: A woman returns to the house that was the subject of her father's famous ghost story to uncover the truth about what happened there twenty-five years ago.

title: A Little Life
author: Hanya Yanagihara
synopsis: Follows the lives of four friends in New York over decades, centering on Jude, a man haunted by an unspeakable childhood trauma.

title: Small Things Like These
author: Claire Keegan
synopsis: In a small Irish town in 1985, a coal merchant discovers a secret in the local convent that forces him to confront his conscience.

title: Tomorrow, and Tomorrow, and Tomorrow
author: Gabrielle Zevin
synopsis: Two childhood friends become creative partners in the world of video game design, exploring the heights of success and the depths of personal loss.

title: Rock Paper Scissors
author: Alice Feeney
synopsis: A couple goes on a weekend getaway to a remote chapel in Scotland to save their marriage, but someone doesn't want them to leave.

title: Malibu Rising
author: Taylor Jenkins Reid
synopsis: Four famous siblings throw an epic end-of-summer party in 1983. By morning, the house is in flames and family secrets are out.

title: The Maid
author: Nita Prose
synopsis: Molly Gray, a hotel maid who struggles with social cues, finds a wealthy guest dead in his bed and becomes the prime suspect.

title: Cloud Cuckoo Land
author: Anthony Doerr
synopsis: Spans five centuries and multiple perspectives, all linked by a single ancient Greek manuscript and the power of storytelling.

title: The Only One Left
author: Riley Sager
synopsis: A home health aide is hired to care for an old woman who was accused of murdering her family decades ago and has never spoken about it—until now.

title: Station Eleven
author: Emily St. John Mandel
synopsis: Moving between the days before a global pandemic and twenty years after, following a traveling troupe of actors and musicians.

title: The It Girl
author: Ruth Ware
synopsis: Ten years after her best friend was murdered at Oxford, a woman discovers that the man convicted of the crime might have been innocent.

title: Piranesi
author: Susanna Clarke
synopsis: Piranesi lives in a labyrinthine House of endless halls and statues. He explores his world with peace until another person brings chaos.

title: Project Hail Mary
author: Andy Weir
synopsis: Ryland Grace wakes up on a spaceship with no memory of how he got there or how to save humanity from an extinction-level threat.

title: No Exit
author: Taylor Adams
synopsis: Stranded at a highway rest stop during a blizzard, a college student discovers a kidnapped child in the back of a van parked outside.

title: Bunny
author: Mona Awad
synopsis: A scholarship student in an elite MFA program is drawn into a cult-like clique of girls who call each other 'Bunny' and perform dark rituals.

title: Final Girl Support Group
author: Grady Hendrix
synopsis: A support group for women who survived real-life horror movie scenarios must fight back when someone starts hunting them down.

title: Demon Copperhead
author: Barbara Kingsolver
synopsis: A modern-day reimagining of David Copperfield set in the mountains of southern Appalachia, dealing with poverty and addiction.

title: The Chain
author: Adrian McKinty
synopsis: To save your kidnapped child, you must kidnap someone else's child. If you don't, the chain is broken and your child dies.

title: A Head Full of Ghosts
author: Paul Tremblay
synopsis: A family’s struggle with their daughter's apparent possession is turned into a reality TV show, with devastating consequences.

title: My Sister, the Serial Killer
author: Oyinkan Braithwaite
synopsis: Korede is a nurse whose sister has a habit of killing her boyfriends. She helps clean up the mess until her sister eyes Korede's own crush.

title: The Whisper Man
author: Alex North
synopsis: A father and son move to a new town for a fresh start, only to find themselves targets of a serial killer who whispers at windows.

title: Annihilation
author: Jeff VanderMeer
synopsis: A team of four women enter Area X, a mysterious coastal zone where nature has begun to transform into something unrecognizable and deadly.

title: The Push
author: Ashley Audrain
synopsis: Blythe is determined to be the perfect mother, but she is convinced her daughter has a dark side that her husband refuses to see.

title: Upgrade
author: Blake Crouch
synopsis: Logan Ramsay’s genome has been hacked. He begins to see the world differently, realizing he is being transformed into something beyond human.

title: The Southern Book Club's Guide to Slaying Vampires
author: Grady Hendrix
synopsis: A 1990s housewife joins a book club to escape her boring life, only to realize a charismatic newcomer in town is actually a predator.

title: Never Let Me Go
author: Kazuo Ishiguro
synopsis: Students at an elite boarding school slowly discover the unsettling truth about their purpose in a society that views them as less than human.

title: House of Leaves
author: Mark Z. Danielewski
synopsis: A family moves into a home that is larger on the inside than it is on the outside, leading to a descent into madness and architectural horror.
